articles.title: Block reaches $45M settlement with 46 states over Cash App fraud probe
articles.description: State attorneys general said they found that Block misled users by falsely advertising that Cash App provided bank-like protections, including advanced fraud detection.

articles.title: Ethereum's newest nonprofit wants to become Wall Street's guide to crypto
articles.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re digging into Ethereum Institutional, a new nonprofit aimed at educating financial institutions and banks about Ethereum.

articles.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
articles.description: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

articles.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
articles.description: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

articles.title: 海韻電6月營收1.41 億元

articles.title: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
articles.description: Dealing with large post quantum signatures slowing down Bitcoin can be solved with bigger blocks, or aggregating signatures using STARK proofs.

articles.title: Aave rolls out vaults for yield-hungry fintech investors
articles.description: Aave's new Stable Vaults product lets wallets, exchanges and payment apps offer yields on stablecoin deposits

articles.title: 確保美國關鍵製造材料穩定，美光宣布投資環球晶圓 5 億美元
articles.description: 美商記憶體大廠美光宣布，計畫投入最高達 30 億美元，以強化美國半導體供應鏈生態系，並建立未來技術創新所需的關 […]

articles.title: Age verification is the surveillance nobody voted for
articles.description: KOSA and Chat Control both retreated on their most-criticized measures this week, but both kept mandatory age verification, the quiet mechanism that turns anonymous browsing into identified browsing for all of us, argues Billions CEO Evin McMullen.

articles.title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
articles.description: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

articles.title: Character.AI enters the microdrama arena with its own productions, but there’s a twist
articles.description: In an interesting twist that takes advantage of the company's core product, users can chat with these shows' characters, ask them questions, and even roleplay different storylines.

articles.title: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
articles.description: Hong Kong’s regulator has ordered crypto platforms and online brokers to meet newly issued phishing-resistant login requirements within the next 12 months.

articles.title: 久元6月營收3.90 億元

articles.title: Over $7.2 billion have migrated from LayerZero to Chainlink CCIP as Mantle joins exodus
articles.description: Migrations to Chainlink CCIP so far include Kelp and Lombard, both of which brought over $1 billion, as well as Solv Protocol, Virtuals, Re and Kraken’s tokenized assets.

articles.title: Nandan Nilekani leaves GP role at Fundamentum as it launches $200M third fund
articles.description: Nilekani remains Fundamentum's anchor investor as the firm expands its leadership team and targets AI and fintech startups in India.

articles.title: Pricing houses in bitcoin exposes dollar's loss of value
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 9, 2026

articles.title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
articles.description: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

articles.title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
articles.description: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

articles.title: Swift rolls out new blockchain ledger to bring 24/7 banking to 17 global giants
articles.description: HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi are among the 17 banks now preparing to pilot live transactions using tokenized digital assets on Swift’s new blockchain payments platform.

articles.title: 茂矽6月營收月增1.4%
